Frequently Asked Questions

Quick answers to common questions about our services and process

How long does it take to build a website?

+

The timeline depends on the complexity of your project. Full custom websites with mobile and PC optimization take anywhere from 4-14 days. While ecommerce websites and full booking system websites may take anywhere from 1-3 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline during our initial consultation.

What's included in your web design service?

+

Every build is custom‑engineered for your brand: responsive design, high‑performance development, CMS setup, and 3 months of post‑launch support. We handle everything end‑to‑end — including secure hosting recommendations and domain setup — no handoff.

Do you provide ongoing maintenance?

+

Yes! We offer ongoing maintenance packages that include security updates, content updates, performance monitoring, and technical support. Our maintenance plans start at $50/month and can be customized to your needs.

Can you help with SEO and digital marketing?

+

Absolutely! We engineer technical full‑backend SEO into every build and can extend with advanced SEO services, content strategy, and conversion optimization as needed.

What if I need changes after the website is live?

+

We include 3 months of post‑launch support with every project for minor changes and updates. After that, choose a maintenance plan starting at $50/month or request larger updates via our streamlined change request process.

Ready to Get Started?
